_comment: Auto-generated by scripts/lint-docs-similarity.mjs. DO NOT edit manually. See T10170 / Saga T9855 / Epic E12.C13 for context. This baseline tracks tolerated PR-diff near-duplicate pairs; the CI gate only runs against `git diff --diff-filter=A <base>...HEAD` so the LEGACY corpus is never scanned — the baseline starts empty and grows ONLY when an intentional exception is recorded via `node scripts/lint-docs-similarity.mjs --baseline`.
